g.text: Continuous metrics are primary. Each point is the median of cohort-specific patient medians from the same primary-independent set used for score synthesis.

text.style: font-size: 5.8px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; fill: #5f6b76

g.text: Colors summarize label sensitivity under uniform ±10% and ±20% threshold perturbations; contributions are mathematical, not causal.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
